text:

text:

author: PC Gamer
text:
Don't expect to kill fish in a future Subnautica 2 patch: 'You are here to exist on this planet, not to dominate it'
Unknown Worlds says it doesn't want players to become "the conquering colonist."

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Please stop submitting AI slop code': team behind popular PS3 emulator call time on user submitted vibe coding
"This wastes maintainer time and, in worse cases, such changes get merged and break functionality for all users."
